title: Donald Trump Demands Netflix ‘Immediately’ Fire Board Member Susan Rice or ‘Pay the Consequences’: ‘She’s Got No Talent or Skills’
content:
ByJack Dunn

Donald Trumptook to Truth Social on Saturday to demand thatNetflix“immediately” fire former UN ambassador and board member Susan Rice or “pay the consequences.” His comments come as the streaming giant is weeks away from acquiringWarner Bros.Discovery for $83 billion.

“Netflix should fire racist, Trump Deranged Susan Rice, IMMEDIATELY, or pay the consequences,”Trump wrote. “She’s got no talent or skills – Purely a political hack! HER POWER IS GONE, AND WILL NEVER BE BACK. How much is she being paid, and for what??? Thank you for your attention to this matter. President DJT.”

Netflix did not immediately respond toVariety‘s request for comment.

Trump’s outrage stems from Rice’s comments on Preet Bharara’s“Stay Tuned with Peet” podcast. During her interview, Rice said that if Democrats win the midterm elections, she predicts an “accountability agenda” for corporations that skirted regulations under the Trump administration.

Rice said, “If these corporations think that the Democrats, when they come back in power, are going to, you know, play by the old rules, and, you know, say, ‘Oh, never mind. We’ll forgive you for all the people you fired, all the policies and principles you’ve violated, all, you know, the laws you’ve skirted.’ I think they’ve got another thing coming.”

In his TruthSocial post, Trump linked to anX postfrom far-right activst Larua Loomer, who wrote that Rice is “threatening half of the country with weaponized government political retribution.” She also forecasted that if Netflix is allowed to acquire Warner Bros., “positive messaging of the Democrats’ upcoming witch hunts against Trump from Barack Hussein Obama and his anti-White racist wife Michelle would likely be blasted across all streaming services.”

“The Netflix-Warner Bros. merger would result in a streaming monopoly, which the Obamas will have a significant stake in,” she added. “President Trump must kill the Netflix-Warner Bros. merger now.”

In early February, Trump told NBC that he thought he “shouldn’t be involved” with the Netflix-Warner Bros. deal, but he seems to have reversed that position.

“I must say, I guess I’m considered to be a very strong president. I’ve been called by both sides. It’s the two sides, but I’ve decided I shouldn’t be involved. The Justice Department will handle it,” Trump said at the time, per an NBC News transcript.

Netflix is currently set to acquire Warner Bros. studios and HBO Max in a transaction worth $83 billion. On Feb. 17, WB. opened a seven-day deliberation period during which the second-place suitor,Paramount Skydance, can make a final push to pull together a stronger offer. On March 20, Warner Bros. Discovery shareholders will vote on the Netflix acquisition.
title_zh: 唐納德·特朗普(Donald Trump)要求Netflix「立即」解雇董事會成員蘇珊·賴斯(Susan Rice)，否則將「承擔後果」： 「她沒有任何才華或技能。」
content_zh:
由傑克·邓恩(Jack Dunn)報導

唐納德·特朗普(Donald Trump)於週六在Truth Social上要求Netflix“立即”解雇前聯合國大使及董事會成員蘇珊·賴斯(Susan Rice)，否則將“付出代價”。他的評論正值這家串流巨頭即將以830億美元收購華納兄弟(Warner Bros.)的幾週前。

特朗普寫道：“Netflix應立即解雇這位種族主義者、特朗普狂熱者蘇珊·賴斯，否則將付出代價。她沒有才華或技能——純粹是一個政治黑客！她的權力已經消失，永遠不會回來。她的薪水是多少？為什麼？？？感謝您對此事的關注。總統DJT。”

Netflix尚未立即回應《綜藝雜誌》(Variety)的評論請求。

特朗普的憤怒源於賴斯在普里特·巴哈拉(Preet Bharara)的“Stay Tuned with Preet”播客上的評論。在她的訪談中，賴斯表示，如果民主黨在中期選舉中獲勝，她預測將會有一個“問責議程”針對那些在特朗普政府期間規避法規的企業。

賴斯說：“如果這些企業認為民主黨在重新掌權後會遵循舊規則，並且會說，‘哦，沒關係。我們會原諒你們解雇的所有人，所有你們違反的政策和原則，所有你們規避的法律。’我認為他們會大錯特錯。”

在他的Truth Social帖子中，特朗普連結了一位極右活動家拉拉·盧默(Lara Loomer)的X帖子，她寫道賴斯正在“用武器化的政府政治報復威脅全國一半的人”。她還預測，如果Netflix被允許收購華納兄弟，“巴拉克·侯賽因·奧巴馬(Barack Hussein Obama)和他的反白人種族主義妻子米歇爾(Michelle)將可能在所有串流服務上大肆宣傳民主黨即將對特朗普的獵巫行動的正面信息。”

她補充道：“Netflix與華納兄弟的合併將導致串流壟斷，奧巴馬一家將在其中擁有重要股份。特朗普總統必須立即終止Netflix與華納兄弟的合併。”

在二月初，特朗普告訴NBC，他認為自己“應該不參與”Netflix與華納兄弟的交易，但他似乎已經改變了這一立場。

特朗普當時表示：“我必須說，我想我被認為是一位非常強大的總統。我被雙方稱讚。這是兩方的事，但我已決定不應該參與。司法部將處理此事。”根據NBC新聞的轉錄。

目前，Netflix計劃以830億美元收購華納兄弟工作室和HBO Max。2月17日，華納兄弟開啟了一個為期七天的審議期，期間第二名競標者派拉蒙·斯凱丹(Paramount Skydance)可以進行最後的努力以提出更強的報價。3月20日，華納兄弟探索(Warner Bros. Discovery)的股東將對Netflix的收購進行投票。
summary_zh:
由傑克·邓恩(Jack Dunn)報導

唐納德·特朗普(Donald Trump)於週六在Truth Social上要求Netflix“立即”解雇前聯合國大使及董事會成員蘇珊·賴斯(Susan Rice)，否則將“付出代價”。他的評論正值這家串流巨頭即將以830億美元收購華納兄弟(Warner Bros.)的幾週前。
